name: joshm1-claude-plugins
description: Personal collection of Claude Code plugins for web development, testing, and git workflows

plugins.name: python-dev
plugins.description: Python development tools: pytest testing agents, pyright strict types, ruff-fix, and Python code smell auditing with strict type safety enforcement

plugins.name: typescript-dev
plugins.description: TypeScript development tools: quick post-edit type checking and linting to catch errors early

plugins.name: browser-testing
plugins.description: Browser automation with agent-browser CLI: E2E documentation and QA with screenshots, user journey walkthroughs, visual testing, UI debugging, and self-verification scripts

plugins.name: git-public
plugins.description: Safe git workflows for public repositories: secret scanning, semantic commits, and commit history security review

plugins.name: dev-utils
plugins.description: General development utilities: skill management, instruction compacting, MCP token tracking, extension creation, git worktree management, screenshot review galleries, and GitHub releases

plugins.name: react-native-appium
plugins.description: React Native/Expo Appium E2E testing: TDD workflow agents, testID auditing, Page Object patterns, WebDriverIO setup, and cross-platform test generation

plugins.name: openclaw
plugins.description: OpenClaw skill authoring: writing SKILL.md files, frontmatter, metadata gating, and directory structure for OpenClaw agents

plugins.name: testing
plugins.description: Test discipline enforcement: never dismiss failing tests as pre-existing, unrelated, or flaky without investigation and evidence
